storyboard.content: I keep getting a fluttering feeling in my chest that comes and goes
When the fluttering happens I feel lightheaded
My heart seems to race for a few minutes and then goes back to normal on its own
I get more tired than usual when I climb stairs
These episodes have been coming and going for the past 3 months
The symptoms are noticeable but I can still go about my day and keep working
I am a 42-year-old woman and the episodes tend to happen when I am stressed at work
